Unicode Ranges

Small Version
0020-005F, 0061-007D, 00A0-00A3, 00A6, 00A8-00A9, 00AB, 00AE, 00B0, 00B4, 00B5, 00B7, 00BB, 00BF, 00C1, 00C9, 00CD, 00D1, 00D3, 00D7, 00DA, 00DC, 00DF, 00E1, 00E9, 00ED, 00F1, 00F3, 00F7, 00FA, 00FC, 02DC, 0301, 0303, 0308, 2013-2014, 2018-201A, 201C-201E, 2022, 2026, 2039, 203A, 20AC, 2122, 2212


Large Version
0020-007E, 00A0-0127, 012A-0137, 0139-017F, 018F, 0192, 01E6-01E7, 01EA-01EB, 01FA-01FF, 0218-021B, 0232-0233, 0237, 0259, 02C6-02C7, 02D8-02DD, 0300-0308, 030A-030C, 0327-0328, 0374-0375, 1E80-1E85, 1E9E, 1EF2-1EF3, 2002-2003, 2007, 2009, 2010-2015, 2018-201A, 201C-201E, 2020-2022, 2026, 2030, 2032-2033, 2039-203A, 203D, 2042, 2044, 2051, 2070, 2074-207E, 2080-208E, 20AB-20AC, 20BA, 2113, 2116-2117, 2120, 2122, 2126, 212E, 215B-215E, 2190-2199, 2202, 2205-2206, 220F, 2211-2212, 221A, 221E, 222B, 2236, 2248, 2260, 2264-2265, 2E18
